assertions.title: Request ID behavior is usable cross-origin

steps.action: OPTIONS preflight request with Origin and Access-Control headers
steps.observed: Access-Control-Allow-Headers includes X-Request-ID, Access-Control-Expose-Headers includes X-Request-ID
X-Request-Id header returned with value test-request-123

steps.action: Connect to WebSocket with auth token

steps.expected: job.started, job.progress events with stable schema
steps.observed: job.started with {type, jobId, status, timestamp}, job.progress with {type, jobId, progress, status, phase, details, timestamp}
All events match documented schema - type, jobId, status, timestamp are consistent; progress events include phase and details

evidence.schemaVerified: All event types have stable fields matching docs/websocket-events.md

steps.action: Create job and cancel via DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{id}

steps.observed: job.cancelled event with {type, jobId, progress, status:'canceled', timestamp}

steps.expected: Terminal status visible to polling clients

evidence.websocketEvent: job.cancelled with status:'canceled' - single deterministic event

assertions.title: Failed jobs preserve meaningful terminal state

steps.action: Create job with invalid subject/session IDs (99999999)
steps.observed: Job created with status='pending', then transitioned to status='failed'

steps.expected: Meaningful terminal status with error info
steps.observed: Job shows status='failed', error='no lectures found', progress=0, all config preserved

steps.action: Verify all job fields are accessible
steps.expected: Polling clients can see full context
steps.observed: id, subjectId, sessionId, status, progress, error, config, createdAt, updatedAt all present

assertions.title: OpenClaw-facing config and manifest surfaces stay in sync

steps.observed: health, auth/login, courses, lectures, jobs all match manifest
CLI returns success=true, meta.command='help', data.commands lists all documented commands

steps.expected: Job, course, lecture schemas match manifest
steps.observed: All response fields match openclaw-manifest.json definitions

evidence.apiRoutes: All documented routes tested and match manifest
evidence.responseSchemas: courses, lectures, jobs response fields verified

assertions.title: Desloppify is integrated as required quality gate

steps.action: Check for desloppify in CI workflow
steps.observed: CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) contains lint, test, review jobs but NO desloppify step

steps.action: Run desloppify status to check score
steps.observed: Overall score is 26.6/100 - significantly below 80 target
desloppify is installed and .desloppify/ state exists, but not integrated into CI

evidence.mainIssues: Test health 19.7%, Design coherence 0%, Abstraction fit 0%, Error consistency 0%

assertions.issues: Two failures: (1) No desloppify step in CI workflow, (2) Score 26.6 is below required 80

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed. VAL-INTEGRATION-012 (desloppify quality gate) failed because: (1) CI workflow does not include a desloppify scan step, and (2) current desloppify score (26.6/100) is significantly below the required 80 target. Main issues per desloppify: test health at 19.7%, design coherence at 0%, abstraction fit at 0%, and error consistency at 0%.
